inputs.label: Initial IRA Balance
inputs.businessContext: Current total balance of the inherited IRA.

businessContext_i18n.en: Current total balance of the inherited IRA.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Miras alınan IRA'nın mevcut toplam bakiyesi.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Solde total actuel de l'IRA hérité.
businessContext_i18n.es: Saldo total actual de la IRA heredada.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الرصيد الإجمالي الحالي لحساب IRA الموروث

inputs.label: Expected Annual Return Rate
inputs.businessContext: Expected annual percentage return on investments.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected annual percentage return on investments.
businessContext_i18n.de: Erwartete jährliche prozentuale Rendite auf Investitionen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de rendement annuel attendu sur les investissements.
businessContext_i18n.es: Rendimiento porcentual anual esperado de las inversiones.

inputs.label: Beneficiary Age
inputs.businessContext: Age of the beneficiary in the current year.

businessContext_i18n.en: Age of the beneficiary in the current year.
businessContext_i18n.de: Alter des Begünstigten im laufenden Jahr.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Âge du bénéficiaire dans l'année en cours.
businessContext_i18n.es: Edad del beneficiario en el año actual.

inputs.label: Life Expectancy Factor
inputs.businessContext: IRS Single Life Expectancy factor from Table I for the beneficiary's age. E.g., for age 50, factor is 36.2.

businessContext_i18n.en: IRS Single Life Expectancy factor from Table I for the beneficiary's age. E.g., for age 50, factor is 36.2.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yararlanıcının yaşına göre IRS Tablo I'den Beklenen Yaşam Süresi faktörü. Örn., 50 yaş için faktör 36,2'dir.
businessContext_i18n.de: IRS Single Life Expectancy Faktor aus Tabelle I für das Alter des Begünstigten. Z.B. für Alter 50 beträgt der Faktor 36,2.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur d'espérance de vie unique de l'IRS de la Table I pour l'âge du bénéficiaire. Ex. : pour 50 ans, facteur = 36,2.
businessContext_i18n.es: Factor de esperanza de vida individual del IRS de la Tabla I para la edad del beneficiario. Ej: para edad 50, el factor es 36.2.
businessContext_i18n.ar: عامل متوسط العمر المتوقع للفرد الواحد من الجدول I حسب عمر المستفيد. على سبيل المثال، لعمر 50، العامل هو 36.2.
